raw_consumer_statement:
Im filing this complaint because I am the victim of an account takeover involving my Best Buy/Citibank account XXXX. The individual who took control of my account was able to verify and approve fraudulent transactions because they had already gained access to my XXXX phone account. 

After taking over my XXXX line, the fraudster used it to approve charges and verify activity with Citibank/Bestbuy impersonating me in the process. I did not authorize these charges and have submitted multiple pieces of proof to both Best Buy and Citibank, including : A police report for identity theft and account takeover ( Case # XXXX ) A fraud verification letter from XXXX, confirming that my XXXX account was compromised and not under my control at the time of the transactions Despite this, Citibank/Best Buy has denied my disputes, claiming I personally accepted the charges. That is not true the person who took over my XXXX line and Citibank account did so without my knowledge or consent, and they used that access to falsely verify the transactions.
